evals.name: Triggered by code-related question
evals.description: The skill should be invoked when the user asks a code-related question or ticket summary.

evals.name: Skipped for process tickets
evals.description: The skill should not explore code for process-only tickets.

evals.name: Returns complete with mentioned file
evals.description: Given a ticket summary and a file that exists, the script returns the file as High relevance.

input.ticket_summary: Auth guard race condition during token refresh

evals.name: Reports missing mentioned files
evals.description: If a mentioned file does not exist, it appears in missing_files and status is partial.

evals.name: Returns needs_input when summary is missing
evals.description: The script returns needs_input when no ticket_summary or question is provided.

evals.name: Respects max_files limit
evals.description: The script returns at most max_files relevant files.

evals.name: Respects process skip
evals.description: The script returns complete with empty results for process tickets unless force is true.

expected.note: process tickets skipped by default; set force: true to override

evals.name: Force overrides process skip
evals.description: When task_type is process and force is true, the script runs the search anyway.

evals.name: Workspace scoping resolves against project_root
evals.description: The script resolves workspace relative to project_root rather than cwd.

evals.name: Falls back to Python walk when rg is missing
evals.description: If rg is not available, the script still finds files using Python os.walk.
